moments.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
moments.blurb: Lionel Richie, the legendary American singer, songwriter, and record producer, celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Career Highlights
angles.copy: From Commodores to solo stardom, Lionel Richie's career has been a wild ride, with hits like 'All Night Long' and 'Hello'.

angles.name: Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: With a career spanning over five decades, Lionel Richie's music continues to inspire new generations of artists and fans alike.

angles.name: Birthday Playlist
angles.copy: Celebrate Lionel Richie's birthday with a playlist of his greatest hits, from 'Three Times a Lady' to 'Dancing on the Ceiling'.

moments.title: The 154th Open Championship
moments.blurb: The Open Championship is set to take place at Royal Birkdale from July 16-19, 2026.

angles.name: Golf's Biggest Stage
angles.copy: The world's top golfers will gather at Royal Birkdale for the 154th Open Championship, competing for the coveted Claret Jug.

angles.name: Course Preview
angles.copy: Get to know the challenging links course at Royal Birkdale, where the world's best golfers will put their skills to the test.

angles.name: Tournament History
angles.copy: The Open Championship has a rich history, with legendary golfers like Jack Nicklaus and Tiger Woods having lifted the Claret Jug in the past.

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games come to Glasgow from July 23 to August 2, 2026, featuring a wide range of sports and athletes from around the world.

angles.name: Games Preview
angles.copy: Get ready for the Glasgow Commonwealth Games, with thousands of athletes competing in sports like athletics, swimming, and cycling.

angles.name: Scottish Athletes
angles.copy: Meet the Scottish athletes who will be competing in the Commonwealth Games, and find out what to expect from the home team.

angles.name: Venue Tour
angles.copy: Take a tour of the venues that will host the Glasgow Commonwealth Games, from the athletics stadium to the swimming pool.

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show, one of the largest agricultural shows in Europe, takes place from July 20-23, 2026, at Llanelwedd, Builth Wells.

angles.name: Show Preview
angles.copy: Get ready for the Royal Welsh Show, with its unique blend of agriculture, food, and entertainment.

angles.name: Agricultural Highlights
angles.copy: Find out what's new in the world of agriculture at the Royal Welsh Show, from livestock to machinery.

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a great day out for the whole family, with activities, rides, and attractions for all ages.

moments.title: National Eisteddfod of Wales
moments.blurb: The National Eisteddfod of Wales, a celebration of language, music, and culture, takes place from August 1-8, 2026, in North Pembrokeshire.

angles.name: Eisteddfod Preview
angles.copy: Get ready for the National Eisteddfod of Wales, with its unique blend of music, poetry, and performance.

angles.name: Cultural Significance
angles.copy: Find out why the National Eisteddfod of Wales is so important to the country's language and culture.

angles.name: Performing Arts
angles.copy: The National Eisteddfod of Wales features a wide range of performing arts, from music and dance to theatre and poetry.

moments.title: Sidmouth Folk Festival
moments.blurb: The 72nd Sidmouth Folk Festival takes place from July 31 to August 7, 2026, in the Devon seaside town of Sidmouth.

angles.name: Festival Preview
angles.copy: Get ready for the Sidmouth Folk Festival, with its unique blend of traditional and contemporary folk music.

angles.name: Lineup Highlights
angles.copy: Find out who's performing at the Sidmouth Folk Festival, from established acts to emerging talent.

angles.name: Festival Atmosphere
angles.copy: The Sidmouth Folk Festival is a unique and special event, with a lively atmosphere and a strong sense of community.
